[[File:Relevance Realization.svg|thumb|400x400px]]
Relevance realization is a process where [[sapients]] avoid [[combinatorial explosion]]. Some call it [[finding the signal in the noise]].

[[John Vervaeke]] writes about this area


It is a very complex process of which most communication is dependent on<ref>https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xZtFMQbFHHY&list=PLM3v2nl0P_5KTXEXVB1evg8c8fhum5Pdm&index=37</ref>

== References ==
[[Category:Sapient Psychology]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Relevance realization]][[sn:Relevance realization]][[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Relevance realization]][[Category:Knowledge]]
[[sn:Relevance realization]]
[[Category:Pages]]
